title: custom folder for all things podman in windows
body:
### Feature request description

I am using podman in windows. I want to have more control as to where podman saves the files it needs. Currently this is what I see when running `podman machine info`
```
EventsDir: C:\Users\me\.local\share\containers\podman\podman
MachineConfigDir: C:\Users\me\.config\containers\podman\machine\wsl
MachineImageDir: C:\Users\me\.local\share\containers\podman\machine\wsl
```

Also not listed here is .ssh folder

Can I configure things so that everything is saved in c:\podman?

This scattering of files and folders is a bit hard to maintain/navigate etc. This is more of a convenience thing for me than podman 

Thanks!

### Suggest potential solution

A configuration file wherein one can specify these key folders

### Have you considered any alternatives?

None

### Additional context

Thanks

comments.body: This would be a nice feature but one should not tinker in these folders anyways, found out the hard way 😆
